impact_rows.impact_summary: Source is treated as stale until public metadata is revalidated.
Existing citations remain visible but cannot be promoted as current.
Requirement regeneration is queued and blocked from active mutation.
Guardrail bundle refresh remains pending reviewer approval.
Contract changes are explicitly disabled for this review packet.
DevHub surface changes require separate attended observation evidence.
Agents must block official actions while stale-source review is unresolved.
Responses must disclose that cited source guidance may be stale.
Placeholders reserve re-extraction work without claiming new source facts.
Reviewer disposition slots are required before release consideration.
Deterministic validation commands are required for promotion review.

re_extraction_placeholders.notes: Re-extract normalized public guidance after source freshness is confirmed.

user_facing_caution_templates: The cited PP&D source may have changed since the last verified extraction; confirm current official guidance before acting.
blocked_action_reminders: Do not upload, submit, certify, schedule, cancel, pay, or alter official records while this stale-source hold is active.

reviewer_dispositions.notes: Confirm source freshness and citation impact before promotion.
